text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. If AI systems learn from biased data, they can make unfair decisions, for example in hiring or lending. This is why fairness must be built into AI from the start. Another issue is privacy: AI often collects large amounts of personal information, so companies need to protect user data carefully. Transparency is also essential—people should understand how AI reaches its conclusions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means creating technology that is safe, trustworthy, and respectful of human rights.
